VISTAR

Brand Building & Investor Readiness | 3 Services

VISTAR transforms your business from just another company into a brand that investors notice and customers trust. Whether it's registering for Bhaskar ID in the Gujarat startup ecosystem, preparing investor-grade pitch decks and financial models, or building a complete brand identity with logo, website, and digital marketing strategy — our team of designers, strategists, and finance experts deliver professional quality that opens doors. With 200+ decks created, 100+ brands built, and ₹500 Crores+ raised by our clients, we make your growth story compelling.

What We Offer

Comprehensive VISTAR Solutions

We cover every aspect of vistar to ensure your business gets the complete support it needs.

Bhaskar ID Registration

Register on the Bhaskar platform — Gujarat's flagship startup ecosystem connecting startups with mentors, investors, corporates, and government resources. Essential for startups looking to build networks and access state-level support.

Financial Deck Preparation

Investor-grade financial presentation covering revenue model, unit economics, 3-5 year financial projections, cash flow analysis, break-even analysis, and key business metrics. Designed to pass due diligence scrutiny.

Investor Pitch Deck

Professional 12-15 slide pitch deck covering problem-solution fit, market opportunity, business model, traction, team, competition, financial ask, and use of funds. Designed by experienced startup strategists who know what investors look for.

Logo Design & Branding

Complete brand identity development including logo, color palette, typography, brand guidelines, business card, letterhead, and social media templates. Consistent branding that communicates professionalism and trust.

Digital Marketing Strategy

Data-driven digital marketing strategy covering SEO, SEM, social media marketing, content marketing, and performance analytics. We create actionable plans that drive traffic, leads, and conversions for your business.

Website Development

Modern, responsive website development optimized for conversions. From landing pages to full e-commerce stores, built with SEO best practices, fast loading speeds, and seamless user experience across all devices.

Our Process

How We Work

Our structured 4-step process ensures a smooth and transparent experience from start to finish.

1

Brand Assessment

We conduct a deep-dive into your business — understanding your vision, target audience, market positioning, competitive landscape, and growth goals. This assessment forms the foundation for all brand and investor materials.

2

Strategy & Design

Our strategists develop your brand narrative, positioning, and messaging framework. Designers create visual identity elements. Finance experts build financial models and projections. Everything is aligned to tell one compelling growth story.

3

Deck/Digital Creation

We create your investor pitch deck, financial deck, brand collateral (logo, cards, letterhead), website, and digital marketing assets. Multiple revision rounds ensure everything meets your vision and investor expectations.

4

Launch & Promotion

Your brand goes live — website deployed, social profiles set up, digital campaigns launched, Bhaskar ID registered. We provide launch support, investor introduction facilitation, and 30-day post-launch advisory.

Eligibility Criteria

  • Registered business entity (Pvt Ltd, LLP, or Partnership Firm)
  • Company incorporated less than 10 years ago
  • Annual turnover below ₹100 Crores
  • Working on innovation or scalable business model
  • Gujarat-based or operating (for Bhaskar ID)
  • Willingness to share business details for accurate deck preparation

Required Documents

  • Certificate of Incorporation / Business Registration
  • Business Plan / Executive Summary
  • Financial Statements (last 2-3 years)
  • Revenue and Traction Data (if operational)
  • Team Profiles with LinkedIn Links
  • Existing Brand Assets (logo, website, if any)
  • Competitor Analysis and Market Research
  • Product / Service Details and Screenshots (if available)
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Got questions about our vistar service? We've got answers.

Bhaskar ID is the identification for Gujarat's startup ecosystem platform. It connects you with mentors, investors, corporate partners, and government initiatives. It's essential for startups based in or operating from Gujarat to access the vibrant state startup community, events, and funding opportunities.
A winning pitch deck tells a compelling story in 12-15 slides: problem, solution, market size (TAM/SAM/SOM), business model, traction, team, competition (with clear differentiation), financials, funding ask, and use of funds. Investors look for clarity, realistic projections, and a strong team.
Our financial deck includes revenue model breakdown, unit economics, 3-5 year income projections, cash flow statements, break-even analysis, key performance indicators, sensitivity analysis, and scenario modeling — everything investors need for due diligence.
Complete brand identity (logo, guidelines, collateral) typically takes 2-3 weeks. Website development takes 3-4 weeks. Investor pitch deck and financial model take 1-2 weeks. An end-to-end engagement is typically completed in 4-6 weeks.
Yes, we facilitate investor introductions through our network of angel investors, VCs, and family offices. We help prepare for investor meetings, provide pitch coaching, and support negotiation until term sheet closure. This is included in our premium package.

Ready to Get Started with VISTAR?
